name: Belt Arpeggio (Mah)
pedagogy: A chest-dominant belt set-up on a 1-3-5-3-1 arpeggio. Sing a bright, open 'mah' and let the vowel narrow toward /æ/ ('ma' as in 'mat') as the keys climb into the belt zone — the bright vowel keeps the larynx in a speech-like, full-metallic 'Overdrive' set-up with strong fold adduction. Source: Broadway belt pedagogy (Roll 2016, Journal of Voice). The app scores your pitch; belt timbre and intensity are yours to feel.
